mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity ( activity_id, activity_name, department, host_unit, manager_id, auditor_id, activity_hour, hour_type, start_time, end_time, sign_type, activity_status, create_time, activity_img, location, capacity, enroll_start_time, enroll_end_time ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{department}, #{hostUnit}, #{managerId}, #{auditorId}, #{activityHour}, #{hourType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{signType}, #{activityStatus}, NOW(), #{activityImg}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{enrollStartTime}, #{enrollEndTime} )
